headline: TensorWave Raises $350 Million Series B at $1.55B Valuation to Expand Global AMD-Powered AI Infrastructure
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 10, 2026--TensorWave, the all-AMD AI cloud specializing in high-performance, memory-intensive workloads, today announced it has raised $350 million in Series B funding. The round was co-led by Magnetar and AMD Ventures, with continued participation from Maverick Silicon, Nexus Venture Partners, and Western Frontier.

content.title: TensorWave Raises $350 Million Series B at $1.55B Valuation to Expand Global AMD-Powered AI Infrastructure
content.summary: LAS VEGAS, June 10, 2026--TensorWave, the all-AMD AI cloud specializing in high-performance, memory-intensive workloads, today announced it has raised $350 million in Series B funding. The round was co-led by Magnetar and AMD Ventures, with continued participation from Maverick Silicon, Nexus Venture Partners, and Western Frontier.

headline: This Week In AI Chips - AI Model NV2 Revolutionizes Business Interactions and Productivity
summary: Napster has introduced the NV2, a new real-time conversational video model aimed at making multimodal video agents more accessible and affordable for businesses of all sizes. Offering full HD, 30 FPS video at a cost significantly lower than current industry standards, NV2 is set to democratize the use of synthetic coworkers capable of executing complex tasks and engaging with clients. This innovation represents a shift towards more widespread adoption of embodied AI in business, potentially...

headline: Broadcom and AMD Sink 4%, NVIDIA Slides 3% as the Chip Selloff Deepens

headline: AMD TensorWave Bet Ties AI Cloud Growth To Rich Valuation
summary: AMD co-led a $350 million funding round in TensorWave, an AI cloud provider that uses only AMD hardware for its training clusters. The deal positions AMD more directly inside the AI cloud infrastructure stack, alongside traditional chip supply. TensorWave plans to build AI cloud platforms around AMD GPUs, offering an alternative to Nvidia focused setups. Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) is drawing attention with this new capital commitment at a time when its stock has had a very large...
